gist.headline: The Scribe is free
gist.blurb: We've removed the paid requirement for the Scribe audio model. Keep generating those sweet audio files on the house.
gist.summary: Removed the paid-only restriction and price overrides for the Scribe audio model, returning it to the free tier.
gist.impact: Users can once again access the Scribe audio model without needing Pollen credits.
gist.visual_concept: A vintage microphone (representing Scribe/audio) with a 'FREE' tag. The bee mascot and Nomnom creature celebrating the removal of the price barrier.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, happily placing a 'FREE' tag on a vintage silver microphone. The round tan nomnom creature is happily eating a discarded price tag. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
